name: oracle-ai-data-platform-workbench-spark-connectors
description: Oracle AI Data Platform (AIDP) Spark connectors for Claude Code: Oracle Autonomous DB family (ALH/ADW/ATP), ExaCS, BDS Hive, Fusion ERP REST, Fusion BICC, EPM Cloud Planning, Essbase 21c, OCI Streaming Kafka. Each skill covers every supported auth method (wallet, IAM DB-Token, API key, Basic, OAuth, Kerberos, LDAP) for use from an AIDP notebook.
